Name: Octopus - Serialize Runbook to Terraform
Description:
Serialize an Octopus runbook as a Terraform module and upload the resulting package to the Octopus built in feed.

Note the exported runbooks do not include project variables, so any project that the exported runbook is attached to must already have all project and library variables defined.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.Exported.Project.IgnoreAllChanges
Parameters.Label: Ignore All Changes
Parameters.HelpText: Selecting this option creates a Terraform module with the "lifecycle.ignore_changes" option set to "all". This allows the resources to be created if they do not exist, but won't update them if the module is reapplied.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.ThisInstance.Terraform.Backend
Parameters.Label: Terraform Backend
Parameters.HelpText: The [backed](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/settings/backends/configuration) to define in the Terraform module.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.ThisInstance.Server.Url
Parameters.Label: Octopus Server URL
Parameters.HelpText: The URL of the Octopus Server hosting the project to be serialized.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.Exported.Space.Id
Parameters.Label: Octopus Space ID
Parameters.HelpText: The Space ID containing the project to be exported

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.Exported.Project.Name
Parameters.Label: Octopus Project Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the project containing the runbook.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.Exported.Runbook.Name
Parameters.Label: Octopus Runbook Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the runbook to serialize.

Parameters.Name: SerializeProject.Octopus.UploadSpace.Id
Parameters.Label: Octopus Upload Space ID
Parameters.HelpText: The ID of the space to upload the Terraform package to. Leave this blank to upload to the space defined in the `Octopus Space ID` parameter.
